about.heading: Hello world!
about.description: Welcome to my website! I'm a Software Engineer in training, with strong Full Stack expertise. Proven experience building scalable SaaS platforms and automating processes that drive operational efficiency.

projects.title: Advanced Frontend Development
bullets: Creation of scalable platforms focused on performance and SEO, using React and Next.js (with Server-Side Rendering and asynchronous components).
Implementation of Mobile First interfaces oriented by Design System (Figma to Code process).
Ensuring high fidelity and responsiveness with Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Backend Architecture & DevOps
bullets: Development of high-performance RESTful APIs using Nest.js, Express, and Python (FastAPI).
Endpoint documentation with Swagger.
Implementation of PostgreSQL and Supabase databases, using containerized environments with Docker.
Data access optimization and relational modeling with Prisma ORM.

projects.title: Deploy Pipeline (CI/CD) & Code Quality
bullets: Automation of continuous integration and delivery pipelines using GitHub Actions.
Ensuring standardization and clean code in versioning through the implementation of Conventional Commits combined with Husky, commitlint, ESLint, Prettier, and lint-staged.

projects.title: Testing Culture (QA)
bullets: Strong focus on application reliability, developing unit and integration tests with Vitest.
Implementation of robust End-to-End (E2E) tests with Playwright and Jest-e2e.

projects.title: Agile Methodologies & Collaboration
bullets: Action guided by the Scrum framework, with practical experience in task pipeline management.
Time tracking and technical documentation (Knowledge Base) using Jira.

projects.title: Development of SaaS Platform for Clients
bullets: Implementation of an access Dashboard using key technologies such as JavaScript, Tailwind, Node.js, and ReactJS.
Database based on PostgreSQL, with GitHub code versioning and AWS EC2 cloud service.
The platform is used by 35+ clients, with more than 200 registered accesses.
Managing numerous daily accesses to the application and database, generating a significant increase in department productivity and service scalability.
Currently providing support and developing new features with a focus on clean code.

projects.title: Repetitive Task Automation (RPA)
bullets: Implemented task automations (Web Scraping) to extract tax guides from government and city council websites.
Development in Python, Selenium, Tesseract OCR, and Openpyxl.
Implemented automations significantly reduced document delivery time to clients, increasing agility, efficiency, and reliability of tax deliveries.
Used by a team of 7+ collaborators.

projects.title: Office 365 Migration and Architecture Project
bullets: Led the corporate migration to the Office 365 ecosystem, acting in information architecture and development of SharePoint pages to centralize file management.
Complete migration management: from hardware/software configuration on workstations to file permission administration, optimizing workflow and cloud file consumption.
Acted as a technical facilitator, resulting in rapid tool adoption and a significant increase in productivity and collaboration between departments.

projects.title: Administrative Support and Billing
bullets: Assisted in the company's billing process, ensuring all processes were completed accurately and efficiently.
Document verification, necessary to ensure all information is complete and correct.
Requested to assist with other administrative tasks in the company.

stack.heading: Development Stack.
stack.description: All the Technologies/Frameworks, Applications, Tools and Services I use to build my projects.

techs.name: Next.js
techs.description: I use Next.js as the frontend framework across all my projects. Its server-side features make it excellent for SEO.

techs.name: Tailwind CSS
techs.description: I use Tailwind CSS to speed up interface development and standardize styling across projects.

techs.name: TypeScript
techs.description: I use TypeScript in full stack development to write safer, typed, and more scalable code.

techs.name: React.js
techs.description: I use React.js to build modern, component-based interfaces, mainly for dashboards and web applications.

techs.name: Node.js
techs.description: I use Node.js on the backend, focused on full stack development and building scalable solutions.

techs.name: Express
techs.description: I know and use Express to structure APIs and backend services with Node.js.

techs.name: Fastify
techs.description: I have experience with Fastify for building high-performance backend APIs.

techs.name: Python
techs.description: I use Python mainly for automating repetitive tasks, web scraping, and processing operational routines.

techs.name: FastAPI
techs.description: I know FastAPI for building Python APIs in a fast and organized way.

techs.name: MySQL
techs.description: I have knowledge in MySQL for data modeling, querying, and backend application integration.

techs.name: PostgreSQL
techs.description: I use PostgreSQL as the database in full stack projects and SaaS applications.

techs.name: Supabase
techs.description: I know Supabase as a database and backend solution for web applications.

techs.name: PocketBase
techs.description: I have experience with PocketBase for supporting applications with a lightweight backend and data management.

techs.name: AWS EC2
techs.description: I use AWS EC2 as a cloud service to host applications and support project infrastructure.

techs.name: Oracle Cloud Services
techs.description: I have basic knowledge of Oracle Cloud Services to support cloud infrastructure solutions.

techs.name: Docker
techs.description: I know Docker for standardizing environments and streamlining application execution and deployment.

techs.name: Kubernetes
techs.description: I have knowledge of Kubernetes as a container orchestration tool in scalable environments.

techs.name: Jira
techs.description: I use Jira as my main project and task management tool, organizing sprints, backlogs, and team workflows. I leverage time tracking to log hours per activity and monitor delivery progress, while also integrating CI/CD pipelines directly into issues to track the full development lifecycle.

techs.name: Git
techs.description: I use Git for code versioning and organizing the development workflow across projects.

techs.name: GitHub
techs.description: I use GitHub for versioning, repository storage, and collaboration throughout development.

techs.name: Bitbucket
techs.description: I know Bitbucket as a code versioning and collaboration platform.
